LanguageData.FCP_Meme_BoS_Codex_Supremacy.description: The Brotherhood of Steel operates under the strict tenets of the Codex, a sacred doctrine that demands the preservation and control of advanced technology. Under Elder Maxson, the Brotherhood has united the ideals of both the Outcasts' technological zealotry and Lyons' willingness to engage with outsiders - but on the Brotherhood's terms. Technology must be controlled, mutants and synths are abominations to be destroyed, and only through discipline and hierarchy can humanity be saved from itself. The Brotherhood is both shield and sword - protecting humanity while ensuring dangerous technology never falls into the wrong hands.
LanguageData.FCP_Meme_BoS_Codex_Supremacy.label: Codex Supremacy
LanguageData.FCP_Meme_BoS_Paladins.description: Paladins are the Brotherhood's elite warriors, clad in power armor and wielding the most advanced weapons. They are the tip of the spear in any Brotherhood operation, trained to engage the most dangerous threats head-on. A Paladin's duty is to lead from the front, inspire their squadmates, and demonstrate the Brotherhood's martial superiority.
LanguageData.FCP_Meme_BoS_Paladins.label: Paladins of Steel
LanguageData.FCP_Meme_Lost_Hills_Codex_Eternal.descri: Lost Hills represents the original Brotherhood of Steel - the purest interpretation of the Codex as written by Roger Maxson himself. Technology must be preserved at any cost, outsiders are never to be trusted, and the Brotherhood's bloodlines must remain pure. Isolation is strength. The wasteland may burn, but the Brotherhood will endure, guarding humanity's technological legacy until the world is ready to rebuild - on Brotherhood terms.
LanguageData.FCP_Meme_Lost_Hills_Codex_Eternal.label: The Codex Eternal
LanguageData.FCP_Meme_Lyons_Shield.description: The Shield of the People represents everything the Lyons Pride stands for - warriors who protect the innocent and fight for those who cannot fight for themselves. They combine Brotherhood combat prowess with genuine compassion, serving as both soldiers and humanitarian workers.
LanguageData.FCP_Meme_Lyons_Shield.label: Shields of the People
LanguageData.FCP_Meme_Lyons_Steel_Compassion.descript: Elder Lyons taught that technology is worthless if it doesn't serve the people. The Lyons Pride believes the Brotherhood must be more than collectors and hoarders - they must be protectors and builders. While still bound by the Codex's technical wisdom, they reject its isolationism. Technology should be preserved, but also deployed to help those in need. The wasteland doesn't need another group of tech-hoarders; it needs guardians who understand that saving humanity means actually helping humans, not just safeguarding artifacts.
LanguageData.FCP_Meme_Lyons_Steel_Compassion.label: Steel Compassion
LanguageData.FCP_Meme_Midwest_Steel_Vanguard.descript: The Midwestern Brotherhood emerged from the wreckage of their crashed airships with a revolutionary understanding: survival demands adaptation. Unlike the isolationists at Lost Hills, the Midwest chapter actively recruits tribals, wastelanders, and even former enemies into their ranks. Technology still matters, but so does building an army capable of holding territory and protecting the people within it. The Codex is a guide, not a chain. Expansion is not corruption - it is evolution.
LanguageData.FCP_Meme_Midwest_Steel_Vanguard.label: The Steel Vanguard
LanguageData.FCP_Meme_Outcast_Defenders.description: Defenders are Outcast specialists who combine superior technical knowledge with combat capability. They are responsible for securing technology from hostile forces and ensuring no advanced equipment falls into unworthy hands. Their dedication to the mission is absolute.
LanguageData.FCP_Meme_Outcast_Defenders.label: Defenders of the Codex
LanguageData.FCP_Meme_Outcast_True_Codex.description: The Outcasts are the Brotherhood's purists - those who refused to compromise the Codex when Elder Lyons went soft. Technology is everything. It's not about helping wastelanders or building communities; it's about preserving humanity's technological legacy before fools destroy it all. The Old World fell because people misused technology - the Brotherhood's sacred duty is to prevent that from happening again by controlling every piece of advanced tech in existence. Outsiders are liabilities at best, threats at worst. Only through absolute dedication to the mission can the Brotherhood fulfill its purpose.
LanguageData.FCP_Meme_Outcast_True_Codex.label: True Codex
